timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: DNA double helix is described
description: The structure of DNA provides the conceptual foundation for later sequencing methods.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Restriction enzymes transform molecular biology
description: The growing use of restriction enzymes helps make DNA analysis and sequencing practical.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: First complete gene sequence is determined
description: Early sequencing work demonstrates that nucleic-acid sequences can be experimentally resolved.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: First published DNA sequencing report appears
description: Walter Gilbert and Allan Maxam publish an early chemical sequencing result.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Sanger sequencing is introduced
description: Frederick Sanger and colleagues publish the chain-termination method that becomes a dominant sequencing approach.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Maxam-Gilbert sequencing is published
description: A second major first-generation sequencing method appears in the same year.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Phi X174 genome is sequenced
description: The first complete DNA genome is determined using sequencing methods.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Automated fluorescence sequencing advances
description: Automation begins reducing manual work and increasing sequencing throughput.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Human Genome Project begins
description: An international effort to sequence the human genome drives major advances in sequencing scale and accuracy.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: First bacterial genome is sequenced
description: Haemophilus influenzae becomes the first free-living organism with a complete genome sequence.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: First eukaryotic genome is completed
description: The budding yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae becomes the first sequenced eukaryotic genome.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Capillary electrophoresis systems improve throughput
description: New instrument designs accelerate large-scale sequencing projects.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Draft human genome is published
description: Research groups release landmark draft sequences of the human genome.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Human Genome Project is completed
description: The reference human genome is declared essentially complete.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: 454 Life Sciences launches early next-generation sequencing
description: Massively parallel sequencing begins moving the field beyond Sanger-scale throughput.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Solexa sequencing gains prominence
description: Short-read sequencing platforms rapidly expand the scale and falling cost of sequencing.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Pacific Biosciences commercializes long-read sequencing
description: Single-molecule long reads open new possibilities for assembly and structural-variant analysis.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Oxford Nanopore releases MinION to early users
description: Portable nanopore sequencing introduces a new model of real-time DNA analysis.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Clinical and public-health sequencing expand during COVID-19
description: Genome sequencing becomes central to tracking viral transmission and variants.

timeline_description: Major scientific and technological milestones in the history of DNA sequencing from early methods to high-throughput and long-read platforms.
title: Telomere-to-Telomere Consortium publishes complete human genome
description: Researchers release the first essentially gapless human genome sequence.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF is created
description: The United Nations establishes the United Nations International Children's Emergency Fund to aid children after World War II.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF begins emergency aid deliveries
description: The organization starts providing food, clothing, and medical supplies to children in postwar Europe.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF expands beyond Europe
description: The agency increasingly directs attention to children in Asia, the Middle East, and Latin America.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF becomes a permanent part of the UN system
description: The UN makes UNICEF a permanent organization and shortens its working name to UNICEF.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: Danny Kaye becomes a UNICEF goodwill ambassador
description: The entertainer's role helps popularize UNICEF's work globally.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF launches wide vaccine and disease-control support
description: The organization expands child-health campaigns in developing countries.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF receives the Nobel Peace Prize
description: The Nobel Committee honors UNICEF for promoting peace and brotherhood among nations through aid to children.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: International Year of the Child raises UNICEF's profile
description: Global campaigns focus attention on children's rights and welfare.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF promotes the child-survival revolution
description: Low-cost interventions such as immunization and oral rehydration become central to its strategy.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: The State of the World's Children report begins
description: UNICEF launches an influential annual publication on child well-being.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: Convention on the Rights of the Child is adopted
description: UNICEF becomes a leading advocate for the landmark children's-rights treaty.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: World Summit for Children is held
description: The summit helps make child survival and development a high-level international priority.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF prioritizes children in armed conflict
description: The agency deepens advocacy and programming around war's impact on children.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF aligns with the Millennium Development Goals
description: Its work becomes tied closely to global targets on health, education, and child survival.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UN General Assembly Special Session on Children is held
description: UNICEF supports a major global review of commitments to children.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF intensifies emergency response capacity
description: The agency broadens work in conflict zones and natural disasters.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF expands digital and innovation work
description: New technology initiatives become a larger part of program delivery and research.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF aligns with the Sustainable Development Goals
description: The organization links its mission to the broader 2030 Agenda.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF responds to the COVID-19 pandemic
description: The agency supports education continuity, vaccine delivery, and child protection during the global crisis.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, evolution, programs, advocacy, and global recognition of UNICEF.
title: UNICEF marks 75 years
description: The organization commemorates three quarters of a century of work for children worldwide.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikipedia launches
description: Wikipedia goes live as a free, collaboratively edited online encyclopedia created by Jimmy Wales and Larry Sanger.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikipedia reaches 100,000 words
description: The project passes an early content milestone as volunteer editing accelerates across the site.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Nupedia ends open submissions
description: Wikipedia's rapid growth increasingly overshadows Nupedia, the more formal predecessor project.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikipedia reaches 1 million words
description: The encyclopedia expands quickly in its first year through open collaborative editing.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: First major non-English editions expand
description: Wikipedia's multilingual editions begin establishing it as a global reference project.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikimedia Foundation is incorporated
description: The nonprofit Wikimedia Foundation is created to support Wikipedia and related free-knowledge projects.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikipedia reaches 500,000 articles
description: The encyclopedia passes a major article-count milestone as its scale increases dramatically.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikipedia reaches 1 million articles
description: Wikipedia records 1 million articles across languages, confirming its emergence as a major reference work.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Nature compares Wikipedia and Britannica
description: A widely discussed Nature study finds Wikipedia approaching Encyclopaedia Britannica on science-article accuracy.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikipedia becomes one of the web's most visited sites
description: Traffic growth turns Wikipedia into one of the most-used information resources on the internet.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: English Wikipedia reaches 2 million articles
description: The largest language edition passes another major growth milestone.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikimedia launches usability and editing reforms
description: The Wikimedia movement begins major work to improve editing, interface design, and contributor experience.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: English Wikipedia reaches 4 million articles
description: The English-language edition continues its long expansion with millions of entries.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikipedia joins the blackout against SOPA and PIPA
description: Wikipedia briefly shuts down its English site to protest U.S. anti-piracy legislation.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: VisualEditor is introduced
description: Wikimedia rolls out a new editing interface designed to make article editing easier for nontechnical users.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikipedia marks its 15th anniversary
description: By its fifteenth year, Wikipedia has become a globally recognized reference source with millions of articles.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikimedia launches the Wikimedia Enterprise era groundwork
description: The movement expands infrastructure and strategic planning for large-scale reuse and sustainability.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikipedia serves a global audience during the COVID-19 pandemic
description: The encyclopedia plays a major role in public information and traffic surges during the pandemic.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikipedia marks its 20th anniversary
description: The project reaches twenty years as one of the world's most consulted reference sites.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, growth, governance, and global development of Wikipedia.
title: Wikimedia Foundation marks 20 years of stewardship
description: The foundation commemorates two decades of supporting Wikipedia and the wider Wikimedia movement.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: YouTube is founded
description: Former PayPal employees Chad Hurley, Steve Chen, and Jawed Karim register YouTube, laying the foundation for the video-sharing platform.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: First YouTube video is uploaded
description: Jawed Karim uploads 'Me at the zoo,' the platform's first public video.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: Beta version opens to the public
description: YouTube begins limited public operation and quickly attracts early users.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: First viral million-view video appears
description: A Nike advertisement featuring Ronaldinho becomes one of the site's first major viral hits.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: YouTube officially launches
description: The service comes out of beta and rapidly expands its traffic and uploads.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: Ten-minute upload limit is introduced
description: YouTube adds a length cap to reduce copyright infringement and platform abuse.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: Google announces acquisition of YouTube
description: Google agrees to buy YouTube in a landmark deal that reshapes online video.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: Google completes YouTube acquisition
description: YouTube formally becomes part of Google, giving it greater scale and infrastructure.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: Localized versions begin expanding internationally
description: YouTube launches local versions in multiple countries, accelerating global growth.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: YouTube Partner Program launches
description: The platform begins sharing advertising revenue with creators, helping define the creator economy.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: HD video support arrives
description: YouTube adds higher-resolution playback, improving quality and expanding mainstream appeal.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: Video rentals expand YouTube's commercial model
description: YouTube experiments with paid long-form content and broadens its business beyond user uploads.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: Gangnam Style becomes first 1 billion-view video
description: PSY's hit marks a new scale for global viral culture on YouTube.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: YouTube launches YouTube Red
description: The company introduces a subscription service for ad-free viewing and original programming.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: YouTube Gaming launches
description: YouTube expands into dedicated live and recorded gaming content.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: YouTube TV launches
description: The platform enters the internet television market with a live-TV subscription product.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: New YouTube logo and design debut
description: YouTube introduces a major visual redesign centered on mobile and app use.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: YouTube Shorts begins testing
description: YouTube starts rolling out its short-form video product in response to changing viewer habits.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: YouTube passes 50 million Music and Premium subscribers
description: Paid subscriptions become a larger part of the platform's business model.

timeline_description: Major milestones in YouTube's founding, growth, products, monetization model, and global cultural influence.
title: YouTube expands monetization for Shorts
description: The company deepens revenue-sharing and creation tools for short-form creators.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Speculative pressure intensifies on the Thai baht
description: Thailand's currency comes under severe pressure as foreign reserves are used to defend the peg.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Thailand floats the baht
description: Bangkok abandons its dollar peg, a pivotal move that triggers the regional crisis.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Contagion spreads to the Philippines and Malaysia
description: Regional currencies and equity markets come under intense speculative attack.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Indonesia widens then abandons rupiah trading bands
description: The rupiah comes under severe pressure as the crisis deepens.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: IMF supports Thailand rescue package
description: International lenders organize a major program to stabilize Thailand.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Hong Kong stock market turmoil shocks global investors
description: A sharp sell-off reveals the crisis has become a global market concern.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: South Korea seeks IMF assistance
description: The crisis reaches one of Asia's largest economies as reserves dwindle and corporate debt strains intensify.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Indonesia signs first IMF agreement
description: Jakarta turns to the IMF amid collapsing confidence and banking weakness.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: South Korea agrees to a large IMF-led package
description: A major rescue program is assembled for Korea during acute financial stress.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Indonesian crisis worsens after reform disputes
description: Political uncertainty and weak confidence deepen the economic collapse.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Thai and Korean restructurings accelerate
description: Governments and lenders pursue banking and corporate reforms to stabilize their economies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Regional recessions deepen
description: Output contracts sharply across several affected economies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Suharto resigns in Indonesia
description: Political upheaval follows economic collapse and social unrest.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Malaysia imposes capital controls
description: Kuala Lumpur adopts a different policy path from IMF-backed adjustment programs.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Regional currencies begin to stabilize
description: Some of the worst panic subsides as policy measures and external support take effect.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Malaysia pegs the ringgit
description: The government fixes the ringgit and reinforces its capital-control strategy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: South Korea records stronger-than-expected stabilization
description: Korea's reform and financing program begins showing recovery effects.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Affected economies return to growth
description: Several crisis-hit countries post renewed economic growth after deep contractions.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Post-crisis reforms reshape Asian financial systems
description: Governments retain larger reserves and strengthen oversight after the crisis.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Asian Financial Crisis
timeline_description: Major milestones in the emergence, contagion, rescue efforts, and aftermath of the 1997–98 Asian financial crisis.
title: Twenty-year reassessments highlight the crisis's legacy
description: Scholars and policymakers revisit lessons on capital flows, exchange rates, and financial governance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: Malaria Control in War Areas is created
description: The wartime malaria-control program in the U.S. South becomes the institutional precursor of the CDC.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: Communicable Disease Center is founded
description: CDC is organized in Atlanta as a successor to wartime malaria control efforts.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC buys land for its Atlanta headquarters
description: A gift of land on Clifton Road helps establish the agency's long-term home.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: Epidemic Intelligence Service is established
description: CDC launches the EIS to train disease detectives for outbreak investigation and public-health response.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC joins the polio vaccination response
description: The agency plays an important role in the national response to the Cutter incident and vaccine safety efforts.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC begins major work on smoking and health
description: The agency expands chronic-disease prevention and public-health research beyond infectious disease.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: Global smallpox eradication campaign begins with U.S. support
description: CDC personnel contribute to the intensified international eradication effort.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC helps identify lead poisoning as a public-health issue
description: The agency broadens work in environmental health and childhood exposure prevention.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: NIOSH joins CDC
description: The National Institute for Occupational Safety and Health becomes part of CDC.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC responds to Legionnaires' disease
description: The agency investigates the outbreak that leads to identification of Legionella.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: Smallpox case tracking nears eradication
description: CDC contributes to the final phase of the global campaign against smallpox.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: Agency name changes to Centers for Disease Control
description: The plural form reflects a more complex structure with multiple constituent centers.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC reports first AIDS cases
description: The agency publishes the first official report of what becomes the AIDS epidemic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC isolates the bacterium causing Legionnaires' disease
description: The agency's laboratory work strengthens its role in infectious-disease identification.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: National Center for Health Statistics joins CDC
description: The agency expands its role in vital statistics and national health data.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: Agency becomes Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
description: Congress adds 'and Prevention' to the official name while retaining the CDC abbreviation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC activates after the anthrax attacks
description: The agency becomes central to U.S. bioterrorism response and preparedness.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC responds to SARS
description: The agency plays a major role in outbreak monitoring and control measures.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC helps lead the Ebola response
description: The agency deploys staff and guidance during the West African Ebola epidemic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
timeline_description: Major milestones in the origins, growth, missions, and public-health role of the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
title: CDC becomes central to the U.S. COVID-19 response
description: The agency leads surveillance, guidance, laboratory work, and communication during the pandemic.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Joseph Pulitzer's will establishes the prize program
description: Pulitzer's will provides for journalism and letters prizes administered by Columbia University.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Columbia School of Journalism opens
description: The school created with Pulitzer's support becomes central to administration of the prizes.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: First Pulitzer Prizes are awarded
description: The inaugural Pulitzers are presented for journalism, letters, and drama.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Public Service gold medal is first awarded
description: The Public Service category begins a long tradition of honoring newsroom civic impact.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Editorial Writing becomes a recognized category
description: The evolving categories reflect specialization within American journalism.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Reporting categories broaden
description: The Board continues refining award structures as journalism changes between wars.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Photography wins formal Pulitzer recognition
description: Photojournalism begins receiving Pulitzer honors during World War II.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: The prize board expands its discretionary role
description: The administration of the prizes becomes more flexible as categories evolve.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Novel category becomes Fiction
description: The books and letters awards are redefined to reflect literary practice more accurately.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: The Board broadens category definitions
description: Mid-century revisions continue adapting the prizes to modern journalism and arts coverage.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Commentary becomes a Pulitzer category
description: The prizes recognize the growing importance of signed opinion and analysis.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Feature Photography becomes a separate award
description: The division distinguishes breaking-news and feature photojournalism.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: The Board marks Joseph Pulitzer's 150th birth anniversary with reforms
description: The organization uses the anniversary to review and update prize practice.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Music prize broadens beyond classical composition
description: The Board begins opening the music category to a wider range of American musical forms.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Online elements become eligible in journalism categories
description: The Pulitzers adapt to the digital transformation of news production.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Allied digital reporting expands eligibility
description: The prize system continues integrating online journalism into its core categories.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Magazine journalism gains expanded eligibility
description: The Pulitzers further adapt to changing formats and publication models.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Audio Reporting category is introduced
description: The prizes officially recognize podcasting and other audio journalism.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Illustrated Reporting and Commentary is added
description: A new category acknowledges visual forms of journalism and commentary.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the creation, administration, categories, and evolution of the Pulitzer Prize.
title: Pulitzer program continues in a digitally integrated era
description: The prize structure reflects journalism that spans print, digital, audio, and visual formats.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Castile and Aragon are united dynastically
description: The marriage of Isabella I and Ferdinand II creates the basis for a unified Spanish monarchy.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Granada falls to the Catholic Monarchs
description: The conquest of Granada ends Muslim rule in Iberia and strengthens royal authority.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Columbus departs on his first voyage
description: Christopher Columbus sails under the Spanish crown, opening Spain's transatlantic empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Second Columbus voyage begins colonization
description: Spain establishes a more permanent colonial presence in the Caribbean.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Balboa reaches the Pacific
description: Vasco Núñez de Balboa crosses Panama and claims the Pacific Ocean for Spain.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Magellan expedition begins
description: The Spanish-backed voyage launches the first circumnavigation of the globe.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Cortes conquers Tenochtitlan
description: The fall of the Aztec capital brings central Mexico under Spanish rule.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Pizarro captures the Inca ruler
description: The seizure of Atahualpa accelerates Spanish conquest of the Inca Empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: New Laws seek to regulate colonial rule
description: The crown issues reforms intended to curb abuses against Indigenous peoples in the Americas.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Philip II becomes king of Spain
description: Under Philip II, Spain reaches a peak of imperial power and administrative centralization.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Spanish victory at Lepanto
description: The Holy League fleet defeats the Ottomans in a major Mediterranean battle led by Spain.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Spanish and Portuguese crowns unite
description: Philip II claims Portugal, briefly extending Spanish imperial reach worldwide.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Spanish Armada is defeated
description: England repels the Armada, marking a famous setback for Spanish power.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Portuguese Restoration begins
description: Portugal revolts against Spanish rule, weakening the composite empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Peace of Westphalia recognizes Dutch independence
description: Spain formally acknowledges the independence of the Dutch Republic.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: War of the Spanish Succession begins
description: A dynastic crisis triggers a major European war over the Spanish monarchy and empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Treaty of Utrecht reduces Spain's European possessions
description: Spain cedes major territories but retains a vast overseas empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Seven Years' War reshapes imperial holdings
description: Spain loses Florida but receives Louisiana, reflecting changing colonial geopolitics.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Spanish American wars of independence begin
description: Revolutionary movements across Spanish America challenge imperial rule.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Battle of Ayacucho secures independence in South America
description: The decisive Patriot victory ends most Spanish rule on the South American mainland.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and colonial milestones in the rise and decline of the Spanish Empire.
title: Spanish-American War ends Spain's major overseas empire
description: Spain loses Cuba, Puerto Rico, Guam, and the Philippines, marking imperial collapse.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Portuguese captives are sold at Lagos
description: One of the earliest large public sales of enslaved Africans in Portugal marks a key stage in Atlantic trafficking.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Portugal builds Elmina Castle
description: The fortress becomes a major hub in the Atlantic trade in gold and enslaved people.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Spain authorizes direct slave shipments to the Americas
description: The crown permits direct transatlantic transport of enslaved Africans to its colonies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: John Hawkins undertakes an English slave-trading voyage
description: England enters the Atlantic slave trade through voyages to West Africa and the Caribbean.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: First recorded Africans arrive in English Virginia
description: A ship brings captive Africans to Point Comfort, a landmark moment in English colonial slavery.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Royal African Company is chartered
description: England grants a monopoly company a central role in the slave trade.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: English slave trade is opened to private merchants
description: The end of monopoly expands British participation in Atlantic trafficking.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Britain gains the asiento
description: The Treaty of Utrecht gives Britain the contract to supply enslaved people to Spanish America.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Atlantic slave trade reaches massive scale
description: By the mid-eighteenth century, forced transport across the Atlantic has become central to plantation economies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Somerset decision challenges slavery in England
description: A court ruling in England becomes an important antislavery reference point.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: British abolition society is founded
description: The Society for Effecting the Abolition of the Slave Trade organizes a sustained reform campaign.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Haitian Revolution begins
description: The uprising in Saint-Domingue transforms the politics of slavery and empire across the Atlantic world.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Britain abolishes the slave trade
description: Parliament passes the Abolition of the Slave Trade Act, banning the trade in the British Empire.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: United States bans the importation of enslaved people
description: A federal prohibition ends the legal transatlantic slave trade to the United States.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Congress of Vienna condemns the slave trade
description: European powers denounce the traffic, though enforcement remains uneven.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Britain and Spain sign an anti-slave-trade treaty
description: The agreement reflects growing international pressure against the trade.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Britain abolishes slavery in most of its empire
description: The Slavery Abolition Act follows the earlier end of the trade and transforms imperial labor systems.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: France abolishes slavery in its colonies
description: The Second Republic decrees emancipation in the French colonial empire.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: United States abolishes slavery
description: The Thirteenth Amendment ends slavery in the United States after the Civil War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Transatlantic Slave Trade
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development, expansion, abolition, and legacy of the transatlantic slave trade.
title: Brazil abolishes slavery
description: The Lei Áurea ends slavery in the last major slave society in the Americas.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Grand Tour concept is identified
description: Mission studies recognize that planetary alignment could enable multi-planet outer-solar-system exploration.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager mission planning takes shape
description: NASA develops the Mariner Jupiter-Saturn concept that evolves into the Voyager program.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 2 launches
description: Voyager 2 begins the first of the twin spacecraft missions to the outer planets.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 1 launches
description: Voyager 1 lifts off on a faster trajectory toward Jupiter and Saturn.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Golden Records are carried into space
description: Each spacecraft flies with a phonograph record intended as a message from Earth.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 1 flies by Jupiter
description: The mission returns unprecedented images and data on Jupiter and its moons.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 2 flies by Jupiter
description: The second spacecraft expands scientific coverage of Jupiter and the Galilean moons.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 1 flies by Saturn
description: Voyager 1 studies Saturn and Titan, then heads out of the ecliptic plane.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 2 flies by Saturn
description: Voyager 2 completes the Saturn encounter and continues toward Uranus.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 2 encounters Uranus
description: The spacecraft makes humanity's first close flyby of Uranus.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 2 encounters Neptune
description: Voyager 2 completes the first and only close flyby of Neptune.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 1 takes the Family Portrait
description: The spacecraft captures a mosaic of the solar system that includes the famous Pale Blue Dot image of Earth.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 1 becomes the most distant human-made object
description: Voyager 1 passes Pioneer 10 in distance from the Sun.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 1 crosses the termination shock
description: The spacecraft enters a new region at the edge of the heliosphere.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 2 crosses the termination shock
description: Voyager 2 reaches the boundary region of the heliosphere.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 1 enters interstellar space
description: NASA later confirms that Voyager 1 has crossed beyond the heliosphere.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Interstellar crossing of Voyager 1 is announced
description: Scientists formally report that Voyager 1 has entered interstellar space.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 2 enters interstellar space
description: Voyager 2 becomes the second spacecraft to pass beyond the heliosphere.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: Voyager 2 becomes NASA's longest-operating mission
description: The spacecraft surpasses Pioneer 6 in continuous mission duration.

timeline_description: Major mission milestones in the conception, launch, discoveries, and interstellar achievements of NASA's Voyager program.
title: NASA resolves a Voyager 2 communication interruption
description: Engineers restore contact after a command error briefly disrupted communication.
